risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to extreme temperature cycling in LEO.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as thermal blankets and heat pipes.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure during launch vibration.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis (FEA) to validate structural integrity.

risk.desc: Deployment mechanism may not function as expected.
risk.mit: Test the deployment mechanism under simulated launch conditions.

risk.desc: Antenna alignment may be compromised during deployment.
risk.mit: Ensure antenna alignment is verified post-deployment.

risk.desc: Electrical connectivity issues due to improper PC/104 stack installation.
risk.mit: Develop detailed assembly instructions and conduct electrical tests.

risk.mit: Test the burn-wire mechanism under simulated environmental conditions.

risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment during assembly and include alignment tools.
